$schema-comment: Bundle size budgets for Dog Universe. Sizes are measured in KILOBYTES (1024 bytes), uncompressed. Numbers reflect what `next build` reports in the 'Size' column (NOT 'First Load JS', which adds shared chunks). Bump only with intentionality.

limits.name: Framework + main shared chunks
limits.rationale: React + Next.js runtime. Should rarely change.

limits.name: Total JS shipped to client
limits.rationale: Sum of every chunk. Bump only when adding a major feature (chart lib, PDF viewer, etc).

limits.name: CSS bundle
limits.rationale: Tailwind purges aggressively; if this jumps you've probably leaked an unused class.
